meaning: Strait津轻海峡(在日本北海道同本州岛之间)
examples: Tsugaru area by using altitude data provided by the Geographical Survey Institute of the Ministry of Construction, Japan.
The Tsugaru Strait separates Hokkaido from Honshu, although the two islands are connected by the underwater railway Seikan Tunnel.
The pictures are made using two types of rice plants: the purple or yellow-leafed “kodaimai” rice and the green-leafed tsugaru-roman rice.
